description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was proceeding straight on a one-way street when a passenger vehicle in the right adjacent lane abruptly 
cut in front of the Zoox vehicle to make a left turn. The passenger vehicle impacted the front right sensors on the Zoox vehicle and 
proceeded left through the intersection. The passenger vehicle drove away without exchanging information. There were no injuries and the 
police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
